name: gerdsenai
description: Professional Markdown-to-PDF document creation with deep research intelligence reports, adversarial red-team quality review, living intelligence monitoring, Extreme Research mode, vector DB reporting, and optional local infrastructure (ChromaDB, Ollama). Powered by GerdsenAI Document Builder. Features multi-source research with citations, automated fact-checking, source freshness tracking, local vector storage with auto-chunking, flexible output locations, recursive builds, and guided setup.
